steps.title: Contrast river-order methods
steps.content: Cartographers tend to order the Yukon River system from its lowest point, the Yukon River. Hydrologists begin at the top of the system, with tributaries fed by the source glacier.

steps.title: Reject similarity and restatement
steps.content: Choice A says the methods are similar, but they begin at opposite ends. Choice C would make hydrologists an example of cartographers, and Choice D would restate the first method. The transition must signal contrast. The answer is B.
